prompt: Storyboard frame 1, aspect 9:16, Minimalist 3D with bright, contrasting colors and simple geometric shapes. Side-view of the tall #AEE2FF blue diving platform with height markers (10m, 20m, 30m) running up its edge in #C754D9 purple, a tiny #FF007F pink ragdoll character crouched at the top about to jump, small circular pool far below. Game's native UI: depth counter '0m' top-right in a purple banner, tap indicator pulsing on jump button. Overlay text 'Perfect entry…' in bold white sans-serif. Flat-shaded, soft pastel sky gradient, authentic Flip & Dive 3D framing. [Audio: VO 'Looks like a normal dive…' / calm satisfying ambient pad at 80 BPM / soft wind whoosh, single UI tick on tap indicator]
